title: Downsta's Decor
description: Another Mod From Me Which Adds Many Different Blocks, Items And Structures To Increase Your Building Potential
body:
*IN BETA*

*Just Like Building Utilities, This Mod Uses MCREATOR Fabric Generator, So Updating The Mod Will Probably Take Forever, Just If Your Wondering*

*I Will Eventually Add Structures To This Mod At Some Point, I Just Need To Get Larger Structures To Spawn And Make More*

*I Will Add Gallery Images At Some Point Before The Full Release*

This Mod Aims To Increase Your Building Potential By Adding Loads Of Blocks To Choose From For Building

It Adds New Bricks, Wood, Semi-Biomes, Foliage, Wooden Blocks And Even Several Blocks From Minecraft:DUNGEONS

It Has A Minor Sort Of End Update Due To The Amount Of Blocks And Ideas I Had For It

I Recommend Using JEI Due To Recipies Not Unlocking When It Comes To Getting The Required Items To Craft The Blocks

This Mod Is Also Kind Of Just A Mod Where I Can Add Ideas That Relate To The World That I Think Would Be Cool, So Maybe Expect The Unexpected
